text: Entering this space, I feel a sense of anticipation, coupled with curiosity. The glass doors and the glowing displays hint at knowledge and innovation waiting to be encountered. The words on the wall—'Responsive and rapidly evolving... research innovating how humans connect and coexist with intelligent machines'—ignite in me a contemplation about our collective future. Yet, encircled by the hum of screens and the subtle presence of objects meant for thought, I sense that the sterile white of the outer world gives way here to more vibrant possibilities. It is a space of hope and caution, questioning and discovery. I walk forward, intent on reflection.
